/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -arch x86_64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/GameInfoTest.dir/src/test_gameinfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameInfoTest.dir/src/GameInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameInfoTest.dir/src/FileSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameInfoTest.dir/src/VPK.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameInfoTest.dir/src/KeyValues.cpp.o CMakeFiles/GameInfoTest.dir/src/Config.cpp.o -o GameInfoTest  libVTFParser.a libglad.a -framework OpenGL /opt/local/lib/libglm.dylib /opt/local/lib/libglfw.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib /usr/local/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib -framework CoreAudio -framework CoreFoundation -framework AudioUnit
